ayahs.translation: Ta, Seen, Meem
These are the verses of the clear Book

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلَّكَ بَٰخِعٞ نَّفۡسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُواْ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Perhaps, [O Muhammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallaka bakhiAAun nafsaka alla yakoonoo mumineena

ayahs.arabic: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنَزِّلۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمۡ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
ayahs.translation: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled
ayahs.transliteration: In nasha nunazzil AAalayhim mina alssamai ayatan fathallat aAAnaquhum laha khadiAAeena

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن ذِكۡرٖ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ مُحۡدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضِينَ
ayahs.translation: And no revelation comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yateehim min thikrin mina alrrahmani muhdathin illa kanoo AAanhu muAArideena

ayahs.arabic: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُواْ فَسَيَأۡتِيهِمۡ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُاْ مَا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
ayahs.translation: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule
ayahs.transliteration: Faqad kaththaboo fasayateehim anbao ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ كَمۡ أَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجٖ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yaraw ila alardi kam anbatna feeha min kulli zawjin kareemin

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئۡتِ ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people
ayahs.transliteration: Waith nada rabbuka moosa ani iti alqawma alththalimeena

ayahs.translation: The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear Allah

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi innee akhafu an yukaththibooni

ayahs.arabic: وَيَضِيقُ صَدۡرِي وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِي فَأَرۡسِلۡ إِلَىٰ هَٰرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And that my breast will tighten and my tongue will not be fluent, so send for Aaron
ayahs.transliteration: Wayadeequ sadree wala yantaliqu lisanee faarsil ila haroona

ayahs.arabic: وَلَهُمۡ عَلَيَّ ذَنۢبٞ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقۡتُلُونِ
ayahs.translation: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me
ayahs.transliteration: Walahum AAalayya thanbun faakhafu an yaqtulooni

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّاۖ فَٱذۡهَبَا بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسۡتَمِعُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Allah] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kalla faithhaba biayatina inna maAAakum mustamiAAoona

ayahs.arabic: فَأۡتِيَا فِرۡعَوۡنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Go to Pharaoh and say, 'We are the messengers of the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Fatiya firAAawna faqoola inna rasoolu rabbi alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: [Commanded to say], "Send with us the Children of Israel

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَلَمۡ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدٗا وَلَبِثۡتَ فِينَا مِنۡ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you remained among us for years of your life
ayahs.transliteration: Qala alam nurabbika feena waleedan walabithta feena min AAumurika sineena

ayahs.arabic: وَفَعَلۡتَ فَعۡلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِي فَعَلۡتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful
ayahs.transliteration: WafaAAalta faAAlataka allatee faAAalta waanta mina alkafireena

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَعَلۡتُهَآ إِذٗا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray
ayahs.transliteration: Qala faAAaltuha ithan waana mina alddalleena

ayahs.arabic: فَفَرَرۡتُ مِنكُمۡ لَمَّا خِفۡتُكُمۡ فَوَهَبَ لِي رَبِّي حُكۡمٗا وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
ayahs.translation: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me wisdom and prophethood and appointed me [as one] of the messengers
ayahs.transliteration: Fafarartu minkum lamma khiftukum fawahaba lee rabbee hukman wajaAAalanee mina almursaleena

ayahs.arabic: وَتِلۡكَ نِعۡمَةٞ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَيَّ أَنۡ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.translation: And is this a favor of which you remind me - that you have enslaved the Children of Israel
ayahs.transliteration: Watilka niAAmatun tamunnuha AAalayya an AAabbadta banee israeela

ayahs.translation: Said Pharaoh, "And what is the Lord of the worlds

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena

ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said to those around him, "Do you not hear
[Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِيٓ أُرۡسِلَ إِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمَجۡنُونٞ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Indeed, your 'messenger' who has been sent to you is mad
ayahs.transliteration: Qala inna rasoolakumu allathee orsila ilaykum lamajnoonun

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغۡرِبِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآۖ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡقِلُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi wama baynahuma in kuntum taAAqiloona

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذۡتَ إِلَٰهًا غَيۡرِي لَأَجۡعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمَسۡجُونِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "If you take a god other than me, I will surely place you among those imprisoned
ayahs.transliteration: Qala laini ittakhathta ilahan ghayree laajAAalannaka mina almasjooneena

ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you proof manifest

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَأۡتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Then bring it, if you should be of the truthful
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fati bihi in kunta mina alssadiqeena

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلۡقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ ثُعۡبَانٞ مُّبِينٞ
ayahs.translation: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqa AAasahu faitha hiya thuAAbanun mubeenun

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِيَ بَيۡضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers
ayahs.transliteration: WanazaAAa yadahu faitha hiya baydao lilnnathireena

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لِلۡمَلَإِ حَوۡلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٞ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said to the eminent ones around him, "Indeed, this is a learned magician
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lilmalai hawlahu inna hatha lasahirun AAaleemun

ayahs.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأۡمُرُونَ
ayahs.translation: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise
ayahs.transliteration: Yureedu an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihi famatha tamuroona

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓاْ أَرۡجِهۡ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبۡعَثۡ فِي ٱلۡمَدَآئِنِ حَٰشِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo arjih waakhahu waibAAath fee almadaini hashireena

ayahs.translation: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician
So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day
And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallana nattabiAAu alssaharata in kanoo humu alghalibeena

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُواْ لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجۡرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحۡنُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: And when the magicians arrived, they said to Pharaoh, "Is there indeed for us a reward if we are the predominant
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma jaa alssaharatu qaloo lifirAAawna ainna lana laajran in kunna nahnu alghalibeena

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ نَعَمۡ وَإِنَّكُمۡ إِذٗا لَّمِنَ ٱلۡمُقَرَّبِينَ
ayahs.translation: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]
ayahs.transliteration: Qala naAAam wainnakum ithan lamina almuqarrabeena

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلۡقُواْ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلۡقُونَ
ayahs.translation: Moses said to them, "Throw whatever you will throw
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lahum moosa alqoo ma antum mulqoona

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلۡقَوۡاْ حِبَالَهُمۡ وَعِصِيَّهُمۡ وَقَالُواْ بِعِزَّةِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: So they threw their ropes and their staffs and said, "By the might of Pharaoh, indeed it is we who are predominant
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqaw hibalahum waAAisiyyahum waqaloo biAAizzati firAAawna inna lanahnu alghaliboona

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلۡقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَلۡقَفُ مَا يَأۡفِكُونَ
ayahs.translation: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqa moosa AAasahu faitha hiya talqafu ma yafikoona

ayahs.translation: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah]
They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds
The Lord of Moses and Aaron

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ قَبۡلَ أَنۡ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمۡۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحۡرَ فَلَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَأَرۡجُلَكُم مِّنۡ خِلَٰفٖ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed Moses before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic, but you are going to know. I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will surely crucify you all
ayahs.transliteration: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falasawfa taAAlamoona laoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum ajmaAAeena

ayahs.arabic: قَالُواْ لَا ضَيۡرَۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la dayra inna ila rabbina munqaliboona

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَطۡمَعُ أَن يَغۡفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna natmaAAu an yaghfira lana rabbuna khatayana an kunna awwala almumineena

ayahs.arabic: ۞وَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنۡ أَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِيٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.translation: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued
ayahs.transliteration: Waawhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee innakum muttabaAAoona

ayahs.translation: Then Pharaoh sent among the cities gatherers
[And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band
And indeed, they are enraging us
And indeed, we are a cautious society
So We removed them from gardens and springs
And treasures and honorable station
Thus. And We caused to inherit it the Children of Israel
So they pursued them at sunrise

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا تَرَـٰٓءَا ٱلۡجَمۡعَانِ قَالَ أَصۡحَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدۡرَكُونَ
ayahs.translation: And when the two companies saw one another, the companions of Moses said, "Indeed, we are to be overtaken
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma taraa aljamAAani qala ashabu moosa inna lamudrakoona

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّآۖ إِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّي سَيَهۡدِينِ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kalla inna maAAiya rabbee sayahdeeni

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضۡرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلۡبَحۡرَۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرۡقٖ كَٱلطَّوۡدِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Then We inspired to Moses, "Strike with your staff the sea," and it parted, and each portion was like a great towering mountain
ayahs.transliteration: Faawhayna ila moosa ani idrib biAAasaka albahra fainfalaqa fakana kullu firqin kaalttawdi alAAatheemi

ayahs.translation: And We advanced thereto the pursuers
And We saved Moses and those with him, all together
Then We drowned the others

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
And recite to them the news of Abraham

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
ayahs.translation: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma taAAbudoona

ayahs.arabic: قَالُواْ نَعۡبُدُ أَصۡنَامٗا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَٰكِفِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo naAAbudu asnaman fanathallu laha AAakifeena

ayahs.translation: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate
Or do they benefit you, or do they harm

ayahs.arabic: قَالُواْ بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo bal wajadna abaana kathalika yafAAaloona

ayahs.translation: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping
You and your ancient forefathers

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوّٞ لِّيٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnahum AAaduwwun lee illa rabba alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me
And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink
And when I am ill, it is He who cures me
And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡمَعُ أَن يَغۡفِرَ لِي خَطِيٓـَٔتِي يَوۡمَ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.translation: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense
ayahs.transliteration: Waallathee atmaAAu an yaghfira lee khateeatee yawma alddeeni

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي حُكۡمٗا وَأَلۡحِقۡنِي بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.translation: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi hab lee hukman waalhiqnee bialssaliheena

ayahs.arabic: وَٱجۡعَل لِّي لِسَانَ صِدۡقٖ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations
ayahs.transliteration: WaijAAal lee lisana sidqin fee alakhireena

ayahs.translation: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure

ayahs.arabic: وَٱغۡفِرۡ لِأَبِيٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.translation: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray
ayahs.transliteration: Waighfir liabee innahu kana mina alddalleena

ayahs.translation: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٞ وَلَا بَنُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma la yanfaAAu malun wala banoona

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنۡ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلۡبٖ سَلِيمٖ
ayahs.translation: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man ata Allaha biqalbin saleemin

ayahs.translation: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous
And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators

ayahs.arabic: وَقِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ
ayahs.translation: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
ayahs.transliteration: Waqeela lahum ayna ma kuntum taAAbudoona

ayahs.arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلۡ يَنصُرُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ يَنتَصِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves
ayahs.transliteration: Min dooni Allahi hal yansuroonakum aw yantasiroona

ayahs.translation: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators
And the soldiers of Iblees, all together
They will say while they dispute therein

ayahs.arabic: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error
ayahs.transliteration: TaAllahi in kunna lafee dalalin mubeenin

ayahs.translation: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds
And no one misguided us except the criminals
So now we have no intercessors
And not a devoted friend

ayahs.arabic: فَلَوۡ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةٗ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers
ayahs.transliteration: Falaw anna lana karratan fanakoona mina almumineena

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
The people of Noah denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum noohun ala tattaqoona

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
So fear Allah and obey me

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: So fear Allah and obey me
They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِي بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do
ayahs.transliteration: Qala wama AAilmee bima kanoo yaAAmaloona

ayahs.arabic: إِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّيۖ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive
ayahs.transliteration: In hisabuhum illa AAala rabbee law tashAAuroona

ayahs.translation: And I am not one to drive away the believers
I am only a clear warner

ayahs.arabic: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمَرۡجُومِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya noohu latakoonanna mina almarjoomeena

ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me

ayahs.arabic: فَٱفۡتَحۡ بَيۡنِي وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ فَتۡحٗا وَنَجِّنِي وَمَن مَّعِيَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers
ayahs.transliteration: Faiftah baynee wabaynahum fathan wanajjinee waman maAAiya mina almumineena

ayahs.arabic: فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
ayahs.translation: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship
ayahs.transliteration: Faanjaynahu waman maAAahu fee alfulki almashhooni

ayahs.translation: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
Aad denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum hoodun ala tattaqoona

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
So fear Allah and obey me

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves
And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally
And when you strike, you strike as tyrants
So fear Allah and obey me
And fear He who provided you with that which you know
Provided you with grazing livestock and children
And gardens and springs

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day
ayahs.transliteration: Innee akhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

ayahs.arabic: قَالُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡنَآ أَوَعَظۡتَ أَمۡ لَمۡ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡوَٰعِظِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo sawaon AAalayna awaAAathta am lam takun mina alwaAAitheena

ayahs.translation: This is not but the custom of the former peoples
And we are not to be punished

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faahlaknahum inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
Thamud denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ صَٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum salihun ala tattaqoona

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
So fear Allah and obey me

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death]
Within gardens and springs
And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit
And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill
So fear Allah and obey me
And do not obey the order of the transgressors

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا يُصۡلِحُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona

ayahs.translation: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا فَأۡتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful
ayahs.transliteration: Ma anta illa basharun mithluna fati biayatin in kunta mina alssadiqeena

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٞ لَّهَا شِرۡبٞ وَلَكُمۡ شِرۡبُ يَوۡمٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
ayahs.translation: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hathihi naqatun laha shirbun walakum shirbu yawmin maAAloomin

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٖ فَيَأۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
ayahs.translation: And do not touch her with harm, lest you be seized by the punishment of a terrible day
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tamassooha bisooin fayakhuthakum AAathabu yawmin AAatheemin

ayahs.translation: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And the punishment seized them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathahumu alAAathabu inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
The people of Lot denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Lot said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum lootun ala tattaqoona

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
So fear Allah and obey me

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: Do you approach males among the worlds

ayahs.arabic: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمۡ رَبُّكُم مِّنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِكُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ عَادُونَ
ayahs.translation: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing
ayahs.transliteration: Watatharoona ma khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwajikum bal antum qawmun AAadoona

ayahs.arabic: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡرَجِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya lootu latakoonanna mina almukhrajeena

ayahs.translation: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it]
My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do
So We saved him and his family, all
Except an old woman among those who remained behind
Then We destroyed the others

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم مَّطَرٗاۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned
ayahs.transliteration: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
The companions of the thicket denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ شُعَيۡبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum shuAAaybun ala tattaqoona

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
So fear Allah and obey me

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

ayahs.translation: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss
ayahs.transliteration: Awfoo alkayla wala takoonoo mina almukhsireena

ayahs.translation: And weigh with an even balance

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَبۡخَسُواْ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِينَ
ayahs.translation: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tabkhasoo alnnasa ashyaahum wala taAAthaw fee alardi mufsideena

ayahs.translation: And fear He who created you and the former creation
They said, "You are only of those affected by magic

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars
ayahs.transliteration: Wama anta illa basharun mithluna wain nathunnuka lamina alkathibeena

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful
ayahs.transliteration: Faasqit AAalayna kisafan mina alssamai in kunta mina alssadiqeena

ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faakhathahum AAathabu yawmi alththullati innahu kana AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
And indeed, the Qur'an is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds
The Trustworthy Spirit has brought it down
Upon your heart, [O Muhammad] - that you may be of the warners
In a clear Arabic language
And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ ءَايَةً أَن يَعۡلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُاْ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.translation: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yakun lahum ayatan an yaAAlamahu AAulamao banee israeela

ayahs.translation: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners

ayahs.arabic: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيۡهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaraahu AAalayhim ma kanoo bihi mumineena

ayahs.translation: Thus have We inserted disbelief into the hearts of the criminals

ayahs.arabic: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
ayahs.translation: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment
ayahs.transliteration: La yuminoona bihi hatta yarawoo alAAathaba alaleema

ayahs.translation: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not
And they will say, "May we be reprieved
So for Our punishment are they impatient
Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
And then there came to them that which they were promised

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُمَتَّعُونَ
ayahs.translation: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided
ayahs.transliteration: Ma aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yumattaAAoona

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa laha munthiroona

ayahs.translation: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust
And the devils have not brought the revelation down
It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able
Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُعَذَّبِينَ
ayahs.translation: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished
ayahs.transliteration: Fala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fatakoona mina almuAAaththabeena

ayahs.translation: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred

ayahs.arabic: وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers
ayahs.transliteration: Waikhfid janahaka limani ittabaAAaka mina almumineena

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ إِنِّي بَرِيٓءٞ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing
ayahs.transliteration: Fain AAasawka faqul innee bareeon mimma taAAmaloona

ayahs.translation: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
Who sees you when you arise
And your movement among those who prostrate
Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing

ayahs.arabic: هَلۡ أُنَبِّئُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
ayahs.translation: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend
ayahs.transliteration: Hal onabbiokum AAala man tanazzalu alshshayateenu

ayahs.translation: They descend upon every sinful liar
They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars
And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّهُمۡ فِي كُلِّ وَادٖ يَهِيمُونَ
ayahs.translation: Do you not see that in every valley they roam
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara annahum fee kulli wadin yaheemoona

ayahs.translation: And that they say what they do not do

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَذَكَرُواْ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرٗا وَٱنتَصَرُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُواْۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓاْ أَيَّ مُنقَلَبٖ يَنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati wathakaroo Allaha katheeran waintasaroo min baAAdi ma thulimoo wasayaAAlamu allatheena thalamoo ayya munqalabin yanqaliboona
